⭐ Candlelight concerts bring the magic of a live, multi-sensory musical experience to awe-inspiring locations like never seen before in Minneapolis. Get your tickets now to discover music at Luminary Arts Center under the gentle glow of candlelight.

events.title: Give & Grow: Woven Together
events.description:
CAPI’s Give & Grow Cultural Gala returns on September 10th! This year’s theme, Woven Together, celebrates the stories, cultures, and connections that strengthen and unite our community.

Join us for an unforgettable evening where the beauty, resilience, and vibrancy of Minnesota’s refugee and immigrant communities come to life through powerful performances and storytelling. This one of a kind cultural gala will feature dance, music, theater, and more, offering an immersive celebration of community and culture. Guests will also enjoy heavy appetizers and have the opportunity to bid on a variety of exciting silent auction items.

Featured performers include:
The Arab Band
Siama Trio
Bao Phi
Twin Cities Bhangra
Ina Yukka

Food catered from:
Holy Land
Himalayan
Rincon Salvadoreno
Croffle Corner

For more than 40 years, CAPI USA has provided critical resources and opportunities for immigrants, refugees, and other historically underserved communities across the Twin Cities. What began in 1982 as a small, culturally specific food shelf has grown into an organization serving more than 10,000 individuals each year. By attending Give & Grow, you help sustain this work and become part of a movement creating stronger, more connected communities.

Gather with us on September 10th to celebrate the joy, resilience, and collective power of our communities and help us continue building a future where all can thrive.
events.excerpt:
CAPI’s Give & Grow Cultural Gala is back! This year’s theme, Woven Together, celebrates the cultures and connections that bind our community.

Experience a night of powerful performances and vibrant storytelling. All in support of immigrants and refugees who call MN home.
